# Pain Language Map

Owner: `organic-traffic-strategist`

```yaml
pain_language_map:
  id: plm-YYYYMMDD-slug
  product_bet_revision_ref:
  owner: organic-traffic-strategist
  created_at:
```

## Language Sources

```yaml
sources:
  competitor_reviews:
  reddit_threads:
  HN_threads:
  X_posts:
  forums:
  search_snippets:
  sales_or_support_quotes:
```

## Phrases

```yaml
pain_phrases:
  - phrase:
    source_ref:
    audience:
    intent: complaint | alternative_search | recommendation_request | migration | pricing | workflow
    strength: weak | medium | strong
    usable_in_landing: yes | no
    usable_in_community_reply: yes | no
```

## Output

```yaml
language_summary:
  strongest_pains:
  words_to_use:
  words_to_avoid:
  positioning_implications:
  sufficiency_status: pass | retry | escalate
```
